premium-china-sneakers-y26-1033.name: Premium China Sneakers-Y26-1033
premium-china-sneakers-y26-1033.description: Step up your style with these premium sneakers featuring a sleek design and superior comfort. The lightweight construction ensures fatigue-free wear while the padded collar offers ankle support. Perfect for daily wear and light sports activities.
premium-china-sneakers-y26-1033.materials: Premium quality materials sourced from trusted suppliers. Built to last with attention to every detail.
premium-china-sneakers-y26-1033.care: Machine washable at 30°C. Do not bleach. Tumble dry low. Iron at medium heat if needed.
